TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nate_Bowman, title = Nate_Bowman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nate_Bowman} }

S.FORM: Nate Bowman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Nate Bowman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nate Bowman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Nate Bowman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nate βowman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, nate βowman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
